base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of castlevania_ruins_tileset — a tile from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Castlevania Ruins atlas — final-area rubble tiles. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Castlevania Ruins atlas — final-area rubble tiles; smallest tileset (467×316) since the final ruins area is compact. End-game bosses and Cross-altar
